# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  MyStack:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::Stack
    Properties:
      Parameters:
        VPCId: !Ref VPC
        EC2SubnetId: !Ref EC2Subnet
        RDSInstanceClass: db.t3.large
        S3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
        LoadBalancerScheme: internet-facing
      TemplateURL: !Sub https://${AWS::Region}.cloudformation.amazonaws.com/latest/templates/${AWS::StackName}/template.yaml
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyStack-VPC
  EC2Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: MyStack-SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref RDSInstanceClass
      AllocatedStorage: 10
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: "5.7"
      VPCSecurityGroups: [!Ref EC2SecurityGroup]
      MasterUsername: myuser
      MasterUserPassword: mypass
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSDBSubnetGroup
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref S3BucketName
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: MyStack-LB
      Subnets: [!Ref EC2Subnet]
      SecurityGroups: [!Ref EC2SecurityGroup]
      Scheme: !Ref LoadBalancerScheme
